page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-128 is a general-purpose server powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor using the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 64 physical cores with multithreading enabled at two threads per core. The system is equipped with 512 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and does not bundle complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core CPU execution, PassMark CPU score, and PassMark CPU physics and encryption tests. Cryptographic capabilities are supported by hardware-accelerated AES, VAES, and SHA_NI instruction sets. Memory performance is strong for cached small-block reads, though large-block uncached read and write bandwidth falls into the average range. The server also achieves strong results in software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations, alongside high static web serving throughput.

Given its high core count and balanced memory allocation, this server offers a resource-dense profile suitable for highly parallelized workloads without the premium cost of specialized memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation pipelines, database operations, static web serving, and moderate LLM prompt processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-128 is a general-purpose server configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 512 GB of RAM, utilizing AMD EPYC 7B13 processors on the x86_64 architecture. Featuring 64 physical cores with multithreading, it delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% on PassMark and stress-ng benchmarks. The hardware includes cryptographic acceleration via AES and SHA_NI flags, though it lacks local storage and GPU resources. Benchmark results show strong performance in software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations, alongside high static web serving throughput. This server provides a cost-efficient, high-density compute profile for parallelized workloads, making it highly suitable for enterprise database hosting, CI/CD compilation pipelines, and multi-threaded web serving applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-standard-128 is a general-purpose server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 512 GB of RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for parallelized enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density, 128-vCPU general-purpose server delivering top-tier multi-core performance and balanced memory for highly parallelized enterprise workloads.

512 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
Top-tier multi-core CPU, physics, and encryption benchmark performance
Strong performance in software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations
No local storage or GPU resources included in the configuration
Best suited for parallelized enterprise workloads, databases, and CI/CD pipelines
